note: Reference sample data for the static Mini_ERP F&B GitHub Pages demo. Runtime data is seeded inside assets/js/app.js and persisted in browser localStorage.
importantRules: Clickable master data codes and document numbers open View mode first.
Edit mode only unlocks allowed fields; document numbers, codes and posted/released documents remain locked.
Purchase Requisition uses PO_CREATED status to prevent duplicate PO creation.
Goods Receipt updates stock in base unit.
This static version has no backend, no SQL Server and no real multi-user persistence.
